instruction: Plan a budget-friendly weekend trip to Paris. Highlight key attractions, dining options, and public transportation routes. Ensure the response includes the phrase "hidden gems of Paris" and provides at least three specific examples of affordable attractions. Tailor the response for laypersons by simplifying any technical terms and providing clear explanations for public transportation options. The letter "P" must appear at least 15 times in the response. Structure the response in JSON format with the following keys: "Attractions", "Dining", "Transportation", and "BudgetTips". Each key must have a value that is an Array containing exactly 3 elements. The response must contain exactly 150 words, with each sentence containing at least 10 words. Avoid using the word "gems" in the response.
response:
{
  "Attractions": [
    "Visit the free Palace of Versailles to see the amazing royal palace and beautiful gardens without paying any entry fees today.",
    "Explore the hidden gems of Paris by walking through the peaceful Luxembourg Gardens where families enjoy the lovely fountains and green spaces.",
    "Climb the free Eiffel Tower stairs to reach the second level and enjoy the incredible panoramic views of the entire city below."
  ],
  "Dining": [
    "Enjoy delicious affordable croissants and fresh coffee at small local bakeries that serve the best morning treats in the whole city.",
    "Savor hearty French stews and bread at traditional bistro places where you can eat large meals for very little money today.",
    "Try simple cheese and wine platters at small neighborhood shops that offer the perfect taste of authentic French culture and flavor."
  ],
  "Transportation": [
    "Use the convenient Metro system which runs frequently and connects every major area of the city with simple blue and red maps.",
    "Purchase a weekly travel pass called Navigo Easy that allows unlimited rides on buses and trains for just a small fixed price.",
    "Walk freely between nearby neighborhoods since many historic sites are close together and walking is the fastest way to explore."
  ],
  "BudgetTips": [
    "Bring your own water bottle to refill at public fountains and save money on expensive drinks sold inside tourist shops everywhere.",
    "Avoid eating near major tourist spots because prices are much higher there compared to quiet streets further away from crowds.",
    "Plan your entire trip carefully before arriving so you can avoid unnecessary costs and focus on free activities throughout your stay."
  ]
}

Conflicts between Keyword Constraints an.new_constraint: Avoid using the word "gems" in the response.
Conflicts between Keyword Constraints an.org_constraint: Ensure the response includes the phrase "hidden gems of Paris."
